## TabWindowParams.colours property

The colours of the window.

Usage: 1. Used for the window background at the top. 2. Used for the background of each tab. 3. Used for widget details and backgrounds.

**Signature:**

```typescript
colours?: [Colour, Colour, Colour];
```
